nasb.text: When he sees riders, horsemen in pairs, A train of donkeys, a train of camels, Let him pay close attention, very close attention.”

esv.text: When he sees riders, horsemen in pairs, riders on donkeys, riders on camels, let him listen diligently, very diligently.”

cnv.text: 他一看見騎兵一對一對而來， 又有驢隊和駱駝隊， 他就要留意，非常留意。”

ccb.text: 他看到战车、一对对的骑兵、 驴队和骆驼队的时候， 要提高警惕，密切察看。”

csbs.text: 当他一看见骈马的战车、 骑驴子的、骑骆驼的， 就要特别留心，多多注意。”
